title: Generative AI
bullets: Introduce Generative AI as a new type of AI focused on creation.
Explain that Generative AI models learn patterns from data to generate new content.
Highlight the difference between Generative AI and traditional AI (discriminative).
Discuss the core concept of 'latent space' and how models represent data.
Describe the process of sampling from the latent space to create outputs.
Provide examples of Generative AI applications: text, images, audio.
Briefly touch on the role of large datasets in training Generative AI.
Emphasize the iterative nature of Generative AI development and refinement.
